suggestedQs.question: On Halloween, was the pumpkin placed on the table first or on the ground first?
suggestedQs.answer: On the table for carving, then outside on the ground
suggestedQs.explanation: The pumpkins were first on a newspaper-covered table for carving, then later displayed outside on a tiled surface or on the ground.

trace.snippet:
(score=0.68) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Pumpkin Carving]: I'm having such a great time getting into the Halloween spirit! Here I am, proudly showing off our carved pumpkins. The big one has a really classic, scary jack-o'-lantern face, and the smaller one is also looking pretty spooky. You can see the remnants of the carving process on the newspaper-covered table – a true sign of a fun, messy afternoon. My smile says it all; I love getting creative for the holidays!

(score=0.65) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here we are, fully embracing the Halloween spirit! I'm in my white jumpsuit and Hannibal Lecter-style mask, crouching alongside my friend who looks fantastic as a quirky scientist with her lab coat and fun, round glasses. We're outside, showcasing our illuminated jack-o'-lanterns, which cast a spooky glow in the dark night. It’s a fun, festive moment, and I love how the pumpkins look after all our hard work!

(score=0.62) Event: Halloween Celebration

These photos capture the fun and creativity of the season and the lively atmosphere of our Hallowe…

(score=0.61) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here's a fun shot of me and my friend showing off our pumpkin carving efforts! You can still see all the pumpkin guts and carving mess on the newspaper, which just shows how much fun we had getting them ready for Halloween!

(score=0.74) 2007-11-18 [City Parade]: Here's another amazing float from the City Parade, really getting everyone excited for the holidays! I captured Santa Claus himself, waving cheerfully from his beautifully decorated golden and red sleigh. It looks like he's just delivered a bunch of colorful presents, all stacked up behind him. His reindeer, with their proud antlers, are pulling the sleigh across what looks like an icy, arctic-themed platform. I can also see a bit of a friendly polar bear peeking out from the bottom left, adding to the festive winter wonderland scene. The clear autumn sky and bare trees in the background are a neat contrast to this vibrant display!

His sleigh was piled high with colorful wrapped presents, and it was being pulled by two reindeer, bringing that classic Christmas magic to the City Parade. Behind him, I could still see the grand, old architecture of the buildings and the bare autumn trees against the clear blue sky, rounding out a truly festive scene.

trace.query: Mickey and Minnie Santa Claus parade

suggestedQs.question: On the day I carved pumpkins, how many pumpkins were on the table?

trace.snippet:
(score=0.70) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Pumpkin Carving]: I'm having such a great time getting into the Halloween spirit! Here I am, proudly showing off our carved pumpkins. The big one has a really classic, scary jack-o'-lantern face, and the smaller one is also looking pretty spooky. You can see the remnants of the carving process on the newspaper-covered table – a true sign of a fun, messy afternoon. My smile says it all; I love getting creative for the holidays!

(score=0.63) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here's a fun shot of me and my friend showing off our pumpkin carving efforts! My big jack-o'-lantern turned out pretty menacing with its sharp teeth, and the smaller one looks hilariously surprised. We're both making silly faces – I'm doing my best 'shocked' expression, and my friend behind the big pumpkin is also getting into the spirit with a silly grin. You can still see all the pumpkin guts and carving mess on the newspaper, which just shows how much fun we had getting them ready for Halloween!

(score=0.56) Event: Halloween Celebration
Date(s): 2007-06-17, 2007-10-31
Description: Getting into the festive spirit of Halloween, I spent time carving pumpkins with friends, creating unique jack-o'-lanterns like the menacing big one and the surprised small one. These illuminated pumpkins were proudly displayed, setting the spooky mood. The celebration continued with us dressed in costumes, posing outside with our creations, and enjoying drinks both indoors at a party and outside. These photos capture the fun and creativity of the season and the lively atmosphere of our Hallowe…

(score=0.55) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here we are, fully embracing the Halloween spirit! I'm in my white jumpsuit and Hannibal Lecter-style mask, crouching alongside my friend who looks fantastic as a quirky scientist with her lab coat and fun, round glasses. We're outside, showcasing our illuminated jack-o'-lanterns, which cast a spooky glow in the dark night. It’s a fun, festive moment, and I love how the pumpkins look after all our hard work!

(score=0.46) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: It's Halloween night, and here are two of our finished jack-o'-lanterns, glowing brightly in the dark! The larger one looks so fierce and jagged-toothed, while the smaller one next to it has this hilariously surprised expression. They're both lit up, casting a warm, spooky glow, perfectly capturing the spirit of the season as they sit on a tiled surface, ready to greet trick-or-treaters or just set the mood.

(score=0.44) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here's another shot of me in my Halloween costume – the white jumpsuit and that unique mask! I'm outside this time, enjoying a sip of red wine from a stemmed glass using a straw, which is definitely a practical way to drink while masked. It looks like it's nighttime, with just a hint of foliage and pink flowers in the background, adding to the slightly spooky, festive atmosphere as the Halloween celebrations continue.

(score=0.42) 2007-10-31 [Halloween Celebration]: Here I am, still fully immersed in the Halloween spirit, enjoying a drink at what looks like an indoor party. I'm wearing my white jumpsuit and that distinctive mask, sipping from a wine glass with a straw, which is a bit of a trick to manage! In the background, a friend is visible, dressed up with a festive red feather boa, adding to the lively atmosphere. It's fun to continue the celebration indoors with everyone.

(score=0.39) 2009-10-31 [Halloween Night 2009]: Wow, what a blast Halloween 2009 was! Here I've captured two fantastic clowns, ready for some spooky fun. The person on the left is rocking a vibrant rainbow wig, a playful red ruffle, and a white shirt splattered with fake blood, all paired with bright yellow pants and those classic oversized blue shoes. Next to them, the other person looks equally amazing in a black and white patterned costume with wild, spiky white hair and some dramatic face paint. We were sitting on what looks like a porch or stoop, and I can even spot a pumpkin in the background, adding to the festive atmosphere of the night.

(score=0.39) Event: Festive Home Gathering
Date(s): 2007-12-29, 2008-01-01
Description: I captured a series of heartwarming and humorous moments during a festive holiday gathering at home, extending into New Year's Day. This included playful antics with friends making exaggerated and comical faces, like a friend pulling at his temples while wearing a paper crown, and another friend comically flexing his muscles while wearing a helmet on a red sofa. I also captured intimate family moments, such as a lovely group photo of a woman embraced by three smiling children in the cozy kitche…

(score=0.37) 2009-06-13 [Camping Trip]: I remember this peculiar and artistic creation we made during our camping trip. It's a stick or skewer adorned with thick slices of various citrus fruits – likely limes, lemons, and oranges – creating a colorful, alternating pattern of greens, yellows, and oranges. What makes it really interesting is the thick, white, gooey substance dripping down, almost like melted wax or sap, covering parts of the fruit and stick, giving it a very unique, somewhat experimental look. It's stuck upright in the ground, surrounded by the natural browns of the forest floor and some green leaves, a little outdoor sculpture from our time in nature.

(score=0.37) 2007-12-29 [Festive Home Gathering]: I captured a sweet moment with a woman, perhaps a family member, holding a young child right in front of our beautifully decorated Christmas tree. She's smiling warmly at the camera, wearing glasses and a cozy brown sweater, while the little one, with their long hair, gently touches her chin, looking a bit curious. The twinkling lights of the Christmas tree in the background, along with a vibrant red poinsettia plant, really set a festive and loving atmosphere. It's a precious snapshot from our holiday gathering at home.

(score=0.37) 2007-11-18 [City Parade]: What a fun float! Here's a vibrant red vintage-style car, transformed into a cheerful parade float. Behind the wheel is a giant, smiling cartoon carrot character, looking very pleased to be driving. In the back, there's a huge ear of corn and what looks like a big beet or potato, all celebrating fresh produce. The license plate even says 'FRESH' with a cute strawberry icon. In the foreground, I can see the backs of two police officers and several hands holding up phones to capture the spectacle, just like I was! The bare autumn trees in the background under the clear blue sky really show it was a perfect day for the parade.

trace.query: pumpkins on a table for carving
trace.snippet:
[Visual analysis of 5 photo(s)]
Based on the photo captions and visual details, the day the pumpkins were carved is depicted in the first two photos (2007-10-31).

In both Image 1 and Image 2, there are **two** pumpkins on the table.

*   **Image 1 (2007-10-31):** Shows a large, carved orange pumpkin with a classic scary jack-o'-lantern face (triangular eyes, nose, jagged teeth) and a smaller, carved orange pumpkin with a surprised face (oval eyes, circular mouth) sitting on a table covered with newspaper. Scattered around them are remnants of the carving process, including orange pumpkin pulp, seeds, and carved-out pieces of pumpkin skin.
*   **Image 2 (2007-10-31):** Also shows the same two carved orange pumpkins on the same newspaper-covered table, with pumpkin guts and carving mess evident on the surface.

photos.caption: Today is a fun sock day.
photos.captionKii: I always love finding ways to add a bit of fun to my everyday outfits, and these light blue socks with the cool black robot design are definitely a favorite. You can see them peeking out from under my blue jeans, paired with my trusty brown leather shoes that have those distinctive reddish-purple laces. It's a simple detail, but it always makes me smile and adds a bit of personality to the day. This was taken indoors, on what looks like a light-colored, textured carpet.

photos.caption: Power is out after the ice storm. Cables down everywhere. Nice day to use our fireplace for the first time.
photos.captionKii: There's nothing quite like the comforting glow of a crackling fire in a fireplace, especially as the colder months set in. I love watching the bright orange and yellow flames dance behind the metal screen, casting a warm light into the room. You can see the logs burning steadily on the grate, creating such a cozy and inviting atmosphere. It’s moments like these, gathered around the warmth of the fire, that truly make a space feel homey and peaceful.

photos.caption: Moody skies.
photos.captionKii: I love this view of the lake, with the sandy shore stretching out before the calm water. The cloudy sky gives everything a serene, almost moody feel, and I can see the line of buoys marking off a swimming area or boundary in the distance. The trees on the left and the grassy dunes really frame the scene beautifully. It's such a peaceful landscape, perfect for a relaxing time by the water, especially after a day of camping.

photos.caption: Toasty.
photos.captionKii: Looking into the heart of the campfire, I was captivated by the intense heat and vibrant colors. The logs were burning down to beautiful, glowing embers, and I love how you can see the deep reds and oranges mixed with those unexpected, mesmerizing streaks of blue flame. It was all contained perfectly within the metal fire pit, providing such a cozy and warm focal point against the dark night. Moments like these, just watching the fire dance, are what make camping so special.

photos.caption: Last campfire of the season.
photos.captionKii: There's nothing quite like gathering around a warm campfire after a day out in nature. The way the flames dance and glow in the dark night always mesmerizes me. I love watching the bright orange and yellow hues twist and turn, sending little sparks flying upwards. It’s the perfect end to a day of camping, creating a cozy and peaceful atmosphere that just makes you feel connected to the wilderness. This moment perfectly captures that warm, inviting feeling of sitting by the fire.

photos.caption: This place is caterpillar city.
photos.captionKii: Wow, I was so surprised to find this huge, vibrant green caterpillar clinging to the side of the tent this morning! It's got such a unique shape, all curled up like that, and I can clearly see its distinct horn-like appendage at the tail end. It blended in quite well with the dark green fabric of the tent, but then I noticed it moving ever so slightly against the blue mesh. Discovering little creatures like this is always a cool and unexpected part of being out in nature on a camping trip.

photos.caption: Sweet, sweet weatherproof camping setup.
photos.captionKii: This shot really takes me back to setting up camp. I remember feeling so satisfied with our little setup, with the grey tent for sleeping and the larger screened tent providing a great bug-free zone for relaxing and eating. That blue tarp strung overhead was essential, offering extra protection from any potential rain or just some nice shade. The two red camping chairs look so inviting, ready for an evening around the campfire. You can even spot my hiking boots next to the tent, ready for some trails, and the firewood piled up, eager to be lit. It was a beautiful, peaceful spot tucked away in

photos.caption: This little dude came to say "hi" to us at breakfast this morning.
photos.captionKii: I was so excited to spot this incredible fuzzy yellow caterpillar! It looks like a real creature from a children's book with its vibrant, almost glowing yellow fur and those delicate black and white tufts on its ends. It was slowly making its way across a dark, textured wooden surface, which might have been an old log or a piece of outdoor furniture. The contrast of its bright color against the dark wood really caught my eye. I just had to capture this moment of finding such a unique little critter!

photos.caption: The Gatwick Manor
photos.captionKii: This really captures the essence of The Gatwick Manor estate, with 'The Manor House' building standing proudly. It's such a classic, charming brick structure with those beautiful tiled roofs and prominent chimneys, set against the vibrant green of the lawn and trees. I remember walking past this grand entrance, taking in the serene atmosphere with the tranquil water body to the left and that striking red-leafed tree adding a splash of color on the right. The prominent sign confirming 'THE GATWICK MANOR TRADITIONAL PUBS FUNCTION ROOMS' really cemented the feeling of a delightful day exploring t

photos.caption: The Tythe Barn
photos.captionKii: It looks like we've arrived at The Tythe Barn, which is part of Gatwick Manor! This photo captures the distinctive gable end of the building, with its classic timber-frame style and white walls, topped by a traditional tiled roof and a sturdy chimney. The large, clear signage makes it easy to spot, nestled among the green trees. I remember being quite impressed with the architecture as we approached.

photos.caption: The Gatwick Manor — Not a bad place to spend one last night before jetting back to Canada...
photos.captionKii: This shot gives a wonderful view of the main Gatwick Manor building, looking so inviting on a bright, sunny day. I love how the brickwork and classic architecture stand out against the blue sky and all the green foliage. In front, you can see a calm pond or stream, reflecting the light, and a prominent sign confirming we've arrived at 'The Gatwick Manor Hotel, Restaurant and Conference Rooms.' The path leading up to it looks so peaceful, and the mix of green trees and that vibrant reddish-leaf tree really adds to the scenic charm of the estate. It's a beautiful complement to our visit to The T

photos.caption: Patio at the Gatwick Manor
photos.captionKii: What a lovely way to wind down the day! I remember us finding this charming pub garden as the evening light began to soften. It was so relaxing to see everyone enjoying themselves, sitting at the outdoor tables under the big red and blue umbrellas. In the foreground, I captured a woman in a black dress by one of the wooden picnic tables, and in the background, you can see other groups mingling and chatting. The atmosphere was just perfect for unwinding after a busy day, with the soft dusk light creating a really tranquil vibe.

photos.caption: Patio at the Gatwick Manor
photos.captionKii: This shot captures a lovely evening out at The Prior House! It looks like we found a great spot on their outdoor patio, with several people already seated at the wooden tables, enjoying the pleasant atmosphere. The lighting is soft, suggesting dusk or early evening, and there are plenty of lush green trees and potted plants around, making it feel very inviting. It's nice to see everyone relaxing and chatting, just soaking up the evening air at this charming spot.

photos.caption: Penny & Liz — Can you tell they're sisters?
photos.captionKii: It was so wonderful to see friends enjoying themselves during the wedding celebration! Here, two of my friends are sharing a sweet moment inside the big white marquee. The one in front, with her lovely long brown hair and a plaid top, is smiling broadly as the other, with darker hair and sunglasses on her head, affectionately embraces her from behind. They're sitting at a table with plates and glasses, probably finishing up a meal or just lingering after the main festivities. The draped fabric of the tent roof above them creates a soft, inviting atmosphere, and their happy expressions really c

photos.caption: IMG_3801

Ten of us are packed into the frame: six men and four women. Two friends are comfortably lying in the foreground, smiling, while the rest of us are playfully piled up behind them, all grinning broadly at the camera. The vibrant green grass and lush bushes in the background really highlight the bright and relaxed atmosphere we shared on that lovely day.

photos.caption: Old Friends Reunited
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic group shot we managed to get in the sunny garden! After the wedding festivities, a bunch of us gathered for one last moment of fun before everyone started heading home. Two friends are playfully lying down in the foreground, smiling at each other, while the rest of us are piled up cheerfully behind them, all grinning at the camera. The bright green grass and the lush bushes in the background made for a perfect, vibrant setting, really capturing the relaxed and happy vibe of the day.

photos.caption: Someone wants to play

He's got our black and white dog on his lap, who seems to be absolutely loving the attention, with its paws up on his chest. You can see the dog looking up at him with such affection. In the background, another friend is smiling, and all the lush greenery, potted plants, and the bright sun just complete the picture of a perfect, easygoing afternoon. It warms my heart to see everyone, including our dog, enjoying themselves so much.

photos.caption: Tasty...

You can see a bright yellow and red toy nearby, probably to keep them entertained. In the background, you can just make out other adults' feet, showing we were all relaxing together. It's moments like these, seeing the pure, innocent interaction between them, that just melt my heart during our backyard get-togethers.

photos.caption: Awww...

The little one is lying on a soft white mat on the paved patio, reaching out with tiny hands towards our black and white dog, who's stretched out comfortably beside them. The dog seems so calm and gentle, just letting the baby explore. There's a cute grey elephant toy and a colorful yellow and red toy nearby, probably keeping the baby entertained. You can just glimpse other adults' legs in the background, showing we were all enjoying the sunny afternoon together. This really captures the re

Many of us had pitched tents for the night, and it was lovely to see them all dotted across the grassy field under such a clear blue sky. In the foreground, there's a dark blue dome tent, and behind it, a much larger, lighter-colored bell tent stands tall. Looking further into the distance, I could still spot the big white marquee where all the lively dancing and celebrations took place yesterday. The bushes and trees around really made for a beautiful setting, and it was a perfect morning for everyon

Here, a woman in a red polka-dot robe is animatedly chatting with a man in a blue t-shirt and another friend in a striped polo, while a fourth friend stretches out on a chair, completely at ease. On the white table, there's a bunch of bananas and some snacks, adding to the casual vibe. The lush green bushes and blooming flowers in the background make for such a pleasant setting for our afternoon hangout. It's moments like these, just chilling and chatting, that I truly

photos.captionKii: I caught this absolutely wild and spontaneous moment during the wedding reception! A big group of guests decided to form a human pyramid, and it was quite a sight, showcasing the sheer fun and energy of the evening. I can see at least eight or nine people involved, men in their shirts and ties, and women in their dresses, all participating with such enthusiasm. The man at the very top is wearing a beige suit jacket, looking down with a big grin. It perfectly captures the energetic and playful spirit of the evening, a

photos.caption: Big sis outlasting little bro
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweet moment of two children during the wedding reception. The little girl, dressed in a lovely white dress with a purple sash, is sitting upright and smiling brightly at the camera, looking quite engaged. Right next to her, the little boy is completely out cold in a comfy rattan armchair, fast asleep with his head leaning back, still in his shirt and tie. He must have been absolutely exhausted from all the wedding festivities! It's a classic sight at a long celebration, seeing the younger guests finally succumb to sleep while others are still full of energy. In the background,

photos.caption: He danced until about midnight
photos.captionKii: I spotted this little one completely zonked out in a rattan armchair, fast asleep with their hands clasped over their tummy. They must have been absolutely exhausted from all the wedding festivities! It's a classic sight at a long celebration, seeing the younger guests finally succumb to sleep. The chair has a nice floral cushion, and in the background, you can see more chairs, showing we were still in the thick of the reception.

photos.caption: Dance floor filling up
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively moment of guests enjoying themselves on the dance floor during the wedding reception. The room is filled with people swaying and socializing, some with drinks in hand, under the beautifully draped white marquee ceiling. You can see various groups of friends and family, some dancing with enthusiasm, others chatting near the tables, all contributing to the energetic and joyful atmosphere of the evening.

photos.caption: Fairy lights
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively scene inside the beautifully decorated wedding reception tent. The white drapes on the ceiling, illuminated by countless small twinkling lights, created such a magical and festive atmosphere. In the foreground, a few men, dressed smartly in shirts and ties, were mingling and enjoying the evening. One of them was even capturing a moment on his phone or camera, just like I was. Further back, other guests were seated at tables, enjoying the celebration. It was a wonderful ambiance for the wedding festivities.

photos.caption: Penny and Gill

They both look so genuinely happy, sharing a laugh and posing for the camera outdoors at night, likely during the wedding reception. The bride is still in her beautiful white strapless gown, and the woman next to her is wearing a colorful patterned maxi dress. It's great to see such joy during the celebration!

photos.caption: Watch the hand...
photos.captionKii: I captured this incredibly tender moment of the bride and groom at the very end of their wedding day. They're standing close, embracing and looking out over a vast, open field, watching the beautiful sunset. The last rays of sun cast a warm glow on the horizon, creating a peaceful and romantic atmosphere. The bride is still in her elegant white strapless gown, and the groom is in his waistcoat, looking so content together. It was such a perfect, quiet ending to a wonderful celebration.

photos.caption: Happy couple watching the sun go down
photos.captionKii: After the reception, I captured this lovely, quiet moment of the bride and groom looking out over a vast, tilled field as the sun began to set. They were standing close, with the bride's arm around the groom, both still in their wedding attire. The warm glow of the setting sun peeked through the trees on the horizon, casting a peaceful light over the landscape. It was a beautiful and serene way to end such a joyous day.

photos.caption: Tom and me reminiscing arm-in-arm about old times... — (We met that week)

Their figures are silhouetted against the vibrant orange and blue evening sky, creating a peaceful scene. The gentle light of dusk illuminates the horizon, highlighting the shapes of the trees and what looks like an open field in the foreground. It was a lovely, quiet moment at the end of a very celebratory day.

photos.caption: Sunset over the Isle of Wight
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene sunset scene over what appears to be a large, dark tilled field. The sun was just dipping below the horizon, casting a warm, brilliant orange glow that peeked through the silhouettes of several large trees on the horizon. The sky transitioned from this vibrant orange to a soft blue, creating a tranquil atmosphere as evening approached. It was a beautiful, peaceful moment to witness the day ending.

photos.caption: Gramma Grigg barn dancing at 85

She's got a lovely smile, looking lively as she dances in the middle of the polished wooden floor under the white marquee. Around her, other guests, including men in suits and women in dresses, are also joining in the fun, adding to the joyous atmosphere of the celebration. It's great to see everyone having such a good time!

photos.caption: The first dance
photos.captionKii: I captured this heartwarming moment of the bride and groom dancing together during their wedding reception. They're on the polished wooden dance floor, looking at each other and sharing a sweet smile as they move. The bride looks elegant in her white wedding gown and veil, while the groom is dapper in his formal suit with tails. In the background, I can see several guests watching and enjoying the celebration within the beautifully draped white marquee, truly a lovely scene to witness.

photos.caption: Busting a move
photos.captionKii: I captured this energetic moment of the bride and groom having a fantastic time dancing during their wedding reception! They're both smiling, holding hands with arms raised high, showing off some lively moves on the polished wooden dance floor. The bride looks radiant in her white gown and veil, and the groom is sharp in his suit. We were all celebrating inside the beautifully draped white marquee, and you can see guests in the background enjoying the festivities, with a bright flash catching the light on the right.

photos.caption: Mr. and Mrs. Lean's first dance

They're gracefully moving on the polished wooden floor inside the beautifully draped white marquee. In the background, many guests are watching with smiles, and I even spotted another photographer, with curly hair and a blue shirt, crouched down to get a unique shot. photos.captionKii: I captured another view of that distinctive blue sign today, fixed firmly onto the weathered stone wall. Its stark white lettering stands out, clearly stating 'PRIVATE BEACH', 'CAUTION FALLING ROCKS', 'YOU ARE REMINDED THAT CLIFFS AND BEACHES ARE DANGEROUS', and 'NO DOGS.' The surrounding rough stone blocks, with their varied textures and hues, truly highlight the ancient and rugged character of this coastal landscape we're exploring. It's a key detail that speaks to both the natural dangers and the local regulations of the area.

photos.caption: Falling rocks... therefore no dogs.
photos.captionKii: As we continued our exploration, I came across this rustic, hand-painted sign fixed right onto the ancient stone wall. It's a stark blue with white lettering, clearly warning about a 'PRIVATE BEACH' and the dangers of 'FALLING ROCKS' from 'CLIFFS AND BEACHES.' There's even a 'NO DOGS' rule at the bottom. It felt like a quintessential piece of the coastal landscape we were exploring, adding to the character and reminding us of the rugged nature of these beautiful surroundings. It really captured the essence of local regulations in such a historic and natural setting.

photos.caption: Tall man no fit inside.
photos.captionKii: I captured another moment with my friend today, who's still sporting his cool sunglasses and beard. He's striking a playful pose, leaning into the small wooden door of that impressive, ancient stone wall we've been exploring. The massive, rough stone blocks rise up behind him, making the small door seem even more mysterious and inviting. It definitely adds a fun, personal touch to our architectural discoveries, showing him enjoying the unique features of this historic structure.

photos.caption: Door for hobbits
photos.captionKii: I stumbled upon this incredibly sturdy and imposing stone wall during my explorations today. The rough, grey-brown blocks are laid together with such craftsmanship, and the way it curves or rises suggests it's part of a significant old structure, maybe even a coastal defense or a fortified dwelling. What really captured my attention was the small, weathered wooden door tucked into the base of the wall. It looked so invitingly mysterious, making me wonder what secrets or history lay behind it. Above, some green ivy adds a touch of natural beauty to the ancient stone, highlighting the contrast b

photos.caption: He's a goof
photos.captionKii: I caught this hilarious shot of my friend lying down on what looks like a rocky or stone surface, holding his camera and just bursting into laughter. He's wearing cool sunglasses and has a big white beard, which makes his joyful expression even more striking. It seems like we were having a really fun time outdoors, maybe taking turns photographing each other or just enjoying the scenery. His enthusiasm was definitely contagious, and I loved capturing this candid, playful moment of him behind the lens.

photos.caption: Father's scary mugshots

It gives the impression that he was preparing these portraits, perhaps for official documents, an art project, or some kind of display, given the repetitive nature of the image. It's an interesting glimpse into a more domestic or administrative task, a clear change of

photos.caption: Resident pub kitty
photos.captionKii: It was such a peaceful moment in the garden today. I caught my sweet tabby cat taking a relaxed break, lounging comfortably under the shade of the green wheelbarrow. Surrounded by all those tiny white daisies scattered across the green grass, with the flower beds in the background, it really captures the calm, everyday beauty of our home. He just looked so content, resting there, and I just had to snap a photo.

photos.caption: Oooold cottage
photos.captionKii: I found this fascinating sign during our walk, which immediately caught my attention with its historical claim. It reads 'RICE COTTAGE REPUTED 1500 CIRCA SMUGGLERS COTTAGE', painted in clear black letters on a white plaque attached to a textured, off-white wall. The idea of a cottage with such a long and intriguing past, especially one linked to smugglers and dating back to around 1500, was a really cool local detail to discover and photograph. It added another layer to the stories hidden within the villages we were exploring.

photos.caption: Alco Stop

The text below warns about the consequences of not complying with alcohol regulations, which was a clear indication of local rules. It stood prominently on a grey pole, with a classic red telephone booth and a white building with a window in the background, adding a touch of everyday life to the otherwise scenic landscapes we had been photographing. It was a qu

photos.caption: Steps up the coastal path
photos.captionKii: I loved walking down this beautiful, winding stone path, which was framed by lush green shrubs and vibrant patches of wildflowers, including delicate bluebells. The path gently sloped downwards, offering glimpses of the calm, grey-blue sea in the distance. It felt so serene and peaceful, a perfect moment during our coastal exploration, truly connecting with nature along these scenic trails.

photos.caption: Steep cliffside path
photos.captionKii: Walking along this winding cliffside path was truly invigorating! It was amazing to see how the trail just hugged the edge, with the calm, grey-blue sea stretching out endlessly below. The path itself was narrow and earthy, perfectly blending into the vibrant green grasses and the small, delicate purple wildflowers that dotted the slopes. It really gave a sense of adventure, tracing the coastline and soaking in all the natural beauty. Each turn offered another breathtaking view, making me appreciate every step of our walk.

photos.caption: Gorran Haven
photos.captionKii: What a picturesque view of this coastal town nestled along the cliffs! From my vantage point, I could see the rugged, moss-covered rocks dropping down into the calm, grey-blue sea. In the distance, a charming cluster of houses with white walls and red roofs sprawls up the green hillside, leading down to a small sandy cove and what looks like a little harbor wall. The overcast sky created a soft, diffused light, perfect for appreciating the quiet beauty of this seaside village. It was such a tranquil scene, exactly the kind of breathtaking landscape I love discovering on our walks.

photos.caption: Looking along the cliffs towards Gorran Haven
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping view of the coastline, with a charming village nestled high on the cliffs overlooking the sea. The houses, mostly white, stretched along the clifftop, creating a picturesque scene under the soft, overcast sky. Below the rugged cliffs, a small sandy beach curved gently, and a solitary boat rested in the calm, grey waters. It was another beautiful vista we encountered during our exploration, showcasing the blend of natural beauty and human presence along this dramatic shore.

photos.caption: Rocks off the south coast near Gorran Haven
photos.captionKii: I loved capturing this rugged stretch of coastline, with its dark, jagged rocks jutting out into the calm, grey sea. The water looked so still and reflective under the overcast sky, with just a hint of white foam where small waves gently met the shore. In the foreground, the grassy slope was vibrant with patches of bright yellow gorse, adding a pop of color to the otherwise muted palette of the rocks and sea. It was another beautiful, wild vista we encountered during our coastal walk, showcasing the raw natural beauty of the area.

photos.caption: Clifftop house near Gorran Haven

A lush, low hedge forms a natural boundary in the foreground, separating the immediate path from the expansive fields beyond. The sky is soft and overcast, adding to the quiet, pastoral charm of the scene. It was a lovely sight during our journey, showcasing another aspect of the

photos.caption: Looking East towards Gorran Haven

The vibrant green hills rise steadily from the shoreline, stretching into the hazy distance under an overcast sky. In the foreground, wild green bushes and thorny shrubs frame the shot, giving a sense of my elevated position, likely from a clifftop path. It was another breathtaking moment on our walk, taking in the vastness and natural beauty of this rugged coastal landscape.

photos.caption: Turtle on its back

You can really see those sturdy hiking boots in action, perfect for navigating these scenic, rugged paths we've been exploring. It perfectly captures the spirit of our day out in the beautiful, natural landscape.

photos.caption: Father relaxing at the Dodman Point

The distant coastline blends into a hazy horizon under an overcast sky, making the height feel even more dramatic. It was a truly breathtaking moment, feeling so high above the vast ocean, taking in the spectacular view of the wild coastline.

photos.caption: Looking west from the Dodman Point
photos.captionKii: I took a moment to capture this exhilarating first-person view, showing my feet in sturdy hiking boots, dangling over the edge of a dramatic coastal cliff. Below, the deep blue sea stretches out, meeting the rugged, green-clad cliffs and revealing hidden coves with incredibly clear, turquoise waters. The horizon is hazy, blending the sea with the overcast sky, emphasizing the vastness of the landscape. It was a truly breathtaking and adventurous perspective, feeling so high above the ocean on our coastal walk.

photos.caption: Sitting on the cliff's edge

Below, the deep blue sea stretches out, sparkling in the distance, and the cliffside itself is covered in vibrant green grass dotted with cheerful yellow wildflowers. It really gives you a sense of just how high we climbed and how breathtaking this coastal walk is. So glad I paused to take this moment in!

It’s these quiet moments in nature, exploring forgotten trails, that I truly cherish.

It felt so peaceful up there, just watching the gentle movement of the ocean against the solid rock formations, with the hazy sky blending softly into the horizon in the distance. It was a beautiful moment of tranquility by the coast.

She's bundled up perfectly for the cold, wearing her light-colored winter coat, vibrant blue gloves, and that wonderfully patterned blue and green scarf. We were at another one of those elevated viewpoints, with the expansive city skyline stretching out behind her, and you can see the bare winter branches with those unique reddish seed clusters framing the scene. Her big smile truly captures the joy we felt exploring the city on such a bright, clear winter day.

photos.caption: View from Mont Royal (2)
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping panoramic view of the city, truly showcasing its expansive skyline under a bright, clear winter sky. In the foreground, the bare branches of trees with some distinctive reddish seed clusters frame the scene, reminding me of the chilly yet beautiful winter day we were experiencing. You can see the urban landscape stretching out, with tall buildings dominating the horizon and glimpses of snow-covered rooftops among the residential areas below. It was a stunning vista from our elevated position, offering a great perspective of our winter city exploration.

photos.caption: Dave and Caralin above Montreal
photos.captionKii: I'm so glad we captured this moment together! Here we are, bundled up in our winter gear – me in my dark coat and scarf, and my lovely companion in her light coat and vibrant blue and green scarf – standing at a scenic viewpoint overlooking the incredible city skyline. The clear blue sky and bright sunshine made it a perfect day for taking in the panoramic views, and you can see the expansive urban landscape stretching out behind us. We were both all smiles, truly enjoying our winter exploration.

photos.caption: Softly does it across the ice...
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment from our winter city exploration, standing on a wide, icy path where large chunks of broken ice were scattered across the frozen ground. It really shows how treacherous, yet beautiful, the landscape was. There were quite a few people around, all bundled up, navigating the slippery terrain. I captured this view with one person in an orange and grey jacket and backpack walking across the ice, and others further back, seemingly taking in the views from what looks like a scenic overlook with a stone balustrade. The bright, clear sky indicates it was another crisp but beautif

photos.caption: So much ice!
photos.captionKii: I was really struck by the beauty of these shattered pieces of ice, glistening under the bright winter sun. They were scattered across the ground, or perhaps a frozen puddle, looking almost like a collection of delicate glass shards. The sunlight reflecting off them created a wonderful sparkle, highlighting the intricate textures and translucent quality of the ice. It was such a clear, crisp day, and moments like these really brought home the frosty beauty of our winter exploration.

photos.caption: Caralin in crazy ice
photos.captionKii: I vividly remember looking down and seeing my own feet, clad in jeans and dark shoes, completely surrounded by these incredible, jagged pieces of ice. It was such a unique sensation to stand right on them, feeling the crunch and seeing the various shapes and sizes of the frozen fragments. This was definitely one of those moments during our winter exploration where the icy landscape felt truly immersive, reminding me just how beautiful and striking our environment was.

photos.caption: Dave and Caralin (2)

The bright blue sky in the background really highlights the clear weather we had while we were out and about, making for a truly cheerful and memorable moment together.

In the background, there's a grand building with a distinct domed roof, adding to the scenic view. It was a crisp, cold day, but her bright smile truly warmed up the scene, and it looks like she might even have a bit of snow in her hand.

The dim lighting, perhaps from an overcast sky or late afternoon, adds a quiet atmosphere to the scene as it takes small steps amidst scattered bits of straw and dirt. It continues my observations of the fascinating poultry in this rural setting.

photos.caption: Fluffy feet! — Bruce Beckons Farm, Wiarton - October 10, 2008

It's quite a departure from my usual scenery, and I was fascinated by its serene presence as it explored its surroundings.

It was interesting to learn about risk mitigation and best practices during these sessions.

There were even people dressed in white, blending in with the arctic theme, sitting on the float. The clear autumn day and bare trees in the background provided a nice contrast to the winter wonderland scene on the float, adding to the variety of the parade!

photos.caption: DSC_0123
photos.captionKii: I snapped a quick selfie while enjoying the vibrant City Parade! I'm smiling brightly, wearing my cap, with the fantastic parade action unfolding right behind me. I managed to capture a float featuring a large white polar bear, complete with a red collar, and two black and white penguins, all part of the winter theme. Around me, I could see other spectators holding up their cameras, just like me, all enjoying the clear autumn day and the lively procession.

photos.caption: DSC_0122
photos.captionKii: I snapped this selfie during the City Parade, enjoying the bright, clear autumn day! My cap is casting a bit of a shadow, but I'm smiling broadly, taking in all the festivities. In the background, you can just make out one of the floats, featuring what looks like white polar bears and penguins, along with other spectators also busy capturing photos of the exciting displays. It was really fun to be out there, soaking up the atmosphere and watching everything unfold!

photos.caption: DSC_0118
photos.captionKii: Another wonderful display from the city parade! I managed to snap this bright and cheerful float featuring a truly massive inflatable snowman, all decked out in a green hat and scarf, waving to the crowd. Right next to it is a charming, elaborate red house-like structure, beautifully decorated with green tinsel and festive wreaths, under a bright blue sky. Down in front, a group of kids are having a blast, all dressed up in fluffy white snowman costumes with red scarves and hats, some even holding blue props. The bright sunshine really highlights the bare autumn trees in the background, making

photos.caption: DSC_0116
photos.captionKii: What a fun float! Here's a silver Mercedes-Benz SUV leading the way for a vibrant parade display, featuring two really cheerful, oversized snowmen. They're both wearing colorful hats – one green, one yellow and blue – and they're positioned next to a charming red house-like structure. It was another crisp, clear day, and you can still see the bare autumn trees and spectators lining the street, all enjoying the spectacle. This float definitely added a touch of winter cheer to the parade!

photos.caption: DSC_0114
photos.captionKii: I captured another unique float from the City Parade, a vibrant red vehicle humorously emblazoned with 'Hahahaha' on the back! Perched on top are these really fun, large cartoonish figures, possibly elves or gnomes, with distinct features and colorful hats in green, blue, and purple. One of them even looks like it's playing a saxophone, adding to the festive music. A person wearing a black jacket and a Santa hat is walking behind it, which is a nice touch. The bare autumn trees in the background and the crowds of spectators still line the street, confirming the crisp, clear day we had for the

photos.caption: DSC_0111
photos.captionKii: What an incredible sight at the parade! I managed to capture this fantastic marching band, all decked out in crisp black uniforms with red accents, and of course, festive Santa hats! They look so sharp as they play their brass instruments, filling the air with music, and those big red flags really add a pop of color to the procession. The background of bare autumn trees and stately city buildings under a bright blue sky confirms it was another beautiful, clear day for the festivities. It was great to see such a spirited performance!

photos.caption: DSC_0107
photos.captionKii: I captured another fun moment from the City Parade, featuring a vibrant red float designed like a snowmobile, carrying a gigantic brown teddy bear adorned with antlers, almost like a moose! Near the float, I saw two lively clowns: one in a distinct red and yellow plaid suit with a bright yellow wig, and another in a colorful multi-patterned suit with a red wig, adding to the festive atmosphere. In the background, more parade participants in various costumes were marching, and spectators lined the street under the clear blue sky, enjoying the show, just like me. The bare autumn trees still fram

photos.caption: DSC_0104
photos.captionKii: I captured more of the festive City Parade, focusing on these fun performers dressed as penguins! They were wearing white and black costumes with orange beaks and big orange feet, marching energetically down the street. Behind them, I also spotted other participants in bright, shiny orange full-body costumes, adding another pop of color to the procession. The bare autumn trees and clear blue sky still framed the scene, and I could see the crowds of spectators lining the street, enjoying the show just like me.

photos.caption: DSC_0103
photos.captionKii: I captured another vibrant moment from the City Parade, featuring a lively group of performers dressed in charming white and orange penguin-like costumes, complete with orange footwear! They were marching in sync, adding a fun, whimsical touch to the procession. Further down the street, I could also see a large, impressive float featuring a polar bear and another figure in white winter attire, reinforcing the winter theme. The scene was framed by the grand, older buildings and the beautiful bare autumn trees, all under a clear blue sky, with other spectators visible on the right, enjoying the

photos.caption: DSC_0102
photos.captionKii: What a great day for the parade! Here I am, bundled up in my brown jacket, plaid scarf, and cap, standing with a lovely woman who's wearing a chic cream-colored coat. We're both all smiles, clearly enjoying the festive atmosphere. You can just see the crowds of other spectators around us and the impressive city buildings towering in the background under that bright blue sky. It was such a crisp, clear autumn day, perfect for being out and about and soaking in all the parade excitement!

photos.caption: DSC_0099
photos.captionKii: I captured another moment from the lively City Parade, showing a diverse group of participants making their way down the street! On the left, I saw people dressed in charming brown, furry animal costumes, while others wore bright red shirts, green pants, and fluffy green wigs, adding a whimsical touch to the procession. Further down the street, I spotted the 'RCSCC QUINTE SEA CADETS BELLEVILLE ONTARIO' banner, followed by a marching band in formation. The autumn trees, mostly bare or with yellow leaves, stood out against the clear blue sky, and I could see spectators gathered along the curb, e

photos.caption: DSC_0098 — Clifford!
photos.captionKii: I captured another fun moment from the City Parade, featuring this impressive, enormous red dog float, complete with big, friendly eyes and a black nose! It was wearing cool blue earmuffs, which really made it stand out as it made its way down the street. In the background, I could still see the bare autumn trees against the clear blue sky, and a crowd of spectators lined the street, enjoying the show just like I was. A person in a yellow jacket was walking alongside the float, guiding it, and in the foreground, I spotted another person watching from what looks like a small vehicle. It was gre

photos.caption: DSC_0096
photos.captionKii: I spotted this incredible gingerbread house float at the City Parade, looking good enough to eat! It was meticulously decorated with all sorts of colorful candies, cookies, and sweet details, making it a true centerpiece of the procession. Ahead of it, I also captured a Lowe's float, featuring two people in chef hats, ready to participate in the festivities. The weather was just perfect for a parade, with a clear blue sky above and the bare autumn trees framing the street, and I could see plenty of other spectators, just like me, enjoying the show and snapping photos from my vantage point.

photos.caption: DSC_0094
photos.captionKii: I'm still taking in the incredible energy of this city parade! Here, I captured a wider view of the procession, showing a diverse group of performers. On the left, a group in striking brown and red striped costumes, possibly with masks or face paint, marches with some interesting props. Further down the street, another group is dressed entirely in white with matching hats, adding to the spectacle. I can see a person in a bright yellow jacket walking alongside them, really standing out! The backdrop of bare autumn trees and that impressive old stone building gives a lovely context to the clear,

photos.caption: DSC_0093
photos.captionKii: I captured another moment from the City Parade, featuring a marching band moving down the street! They were all dressed sharply in blue uniforms with red hats and white accents, carrying their instruments like trumpets, saxophones, and trombones. In the background, I could clearly see some grand, old-fashioned buildings with their distinctive architecture, and the autumn trees, many already bare or with sparse yellow leaves, really stood out against the clear blue sky. It was cool to see such a diverse range of participants in the parade, from floats to these energetic marching bands!

photos.caption: DSC_0089
photos.captionKii: I captured another fun moment from the City Parade, featuring this cheerful, large mascot character with white hair and a big smile, wearing a yellow scarf, white shirt, and blue shorts! It was marching down the street, and behind it, I could see more performers in colorful costumes, adding to the festive atmosphere. In the foreground, I caught the backs of people's heads as they watched, just like I was. The bare autumn trees and clear blue sky were still present, and in the distance, I could even spot some of the grand buildings with their distinctive domes. It was great to see all the diffe

photos.caption: DSC_0086
photos.captionKii: What a fantastic parade float! I captured this vibrant blue and black toy train, complete with a bright red smokestack and shiny golden accents, chugging along. I can see a character peeking out from the train's window, and right behind it, a large, blonde cartoon figure with a white hat is seated on a striped platform. It's cool to see someone else's hands in the foreground also holding a camera, snapping pictures of the same excitement! The bare trees in the background remind me that it was a crisp autumn day for this lively procession.

photos.caption: DSC_0083
photos.captionKii: What a fun group of performers I spotted! These folks are all dressed in bright, fuzzy orange costumes, which look like playful animals, possibly monkeys, and they're carrying large, yellow banana-shaped props. The person in the center is looking right at me with a big smile, clearly enjoying the parade. I can still see the crowds of spectators lining the street and the autumn trees with their bare branches in the background, confirming it's a crisp, clear day for the festivities. They brought such a cheerful and whimsical energy to the procession!

photos.caption: DSC_0082
photos.captionKii: Wow, what an elaborate float! I captured this amazing parade float featuring a giant Barbie doll dressed in a stunning blue and pink gown with beautiful peacock-style wings. She looks like a fairy princess! On the left, a clown with a multi-colored afro wig and a sparkly blue and purple costume is waving, and on the right, another clown in an orange and green outfit also has a vibrant wig. In the background, I can make out some other whimsical characters, possibly from Alice in Wonderland, like a white rabbit's head and a caterpillar. The bare trees in the distance confirm it's a crisp autumn

photos.caption: DSC_0079
photos.captionKii: What a lively moment from the parade! I captured this fantastic mermaid waving directly at me, with her shimmering green tail and vibrant purple hair. Beside her, another performer is dressed in a unique green costume with long, sparkling strands. Further down the street, I can also see three more participants from the sun or flower-themed group, looking radiant in their gold, orange, and red outfits with large, petal-like headdresses and flowing capes. The crowds of spectators are still visible along the roadside, and the bare autumn trees add to the clear, crisp atmosphere of the day. It was

photos.caption: DSC_0078
photos.captionKii: What a radiant sight! I caught this group of five performers in the parade, all dressed in incredible sun or flower-themed costumes. Each outfit is a beautiful blend of gold, orange, and red, with large, circular headdresses that look like petals or sun rays, and flowing capes that seem to billow as they move. Their golden bodysuits gleam in the bright sunlight. In the background, I can still see the crowds of spectators lining the street and the bare autumn trees, which reminds me of the crisp, clear day we had for the parade. They brought such a cheerful energy to the procession!

photos.caption: DSC_0077
photos.captionKii: I captured some truly fantastic performers at the City Parade, dressed in these incredibly elaborate and colorful costumes! Each one had a huge, vibrant floral headpiece, and their flowing garments in green, gold, and purple gave them a mythical or nature-themed look. The performer in the foreground, with her long, reddish-brown hair, was smiling and waving to the crowd, making the whole scene even more lively. It was really cool to see such spirited participants bringing so much energy to the parade, with the bare autumn trees and excited spectators filling the background.

photos.caption: DSC_0076
photos.captionKii: Here's another fantastic group from the parade! I captured this participant in a truly creative mermaid costume, featuring a large, elegant white base and a shimmering orange tail. Behind them, I can see another person in a complementary orange outfit, and above them, several large, colorful cutouts of seashells and a starfish are being carried, really setting an underwater theme. In the foreground, a man in a bright yellow jacket and a white baseball cap is walking by, possibly a parade official or another spectator. The autumn trees in the background are bare, and the crowd is still lining t

photos.caption: DSC_0073
photos.captionKii: What a visually striking group! I captured these parade participants dressed in fantastic, matching yellow and black striped outfits, complete with tall, conical hats. Each person is holding a large, white playing card cutout featuring a bold black spade symbol, which really stands out. Some of them also have accents of light blue polka dots on their costumes, adding another fun layer to their look. They're marching in unison, and in the background, I can still see the crowds of spectators lining the street and the bare autumn trees, reminding me of the perfect, crisp day we had for the parade

photos.caption: DSC_0072 — Yahoo had quite the creative float
photos.captionKii: I captured another unique and creative float at the City Parade – a massive display featuring a lioness or puma character, in a vibrant orange hue, powerfully emerging from what looked like a giant computer screen! The screen itself displayed 'Yahoo! Canada' and had a stunning backdrop of snowy mountains, making it quite a dramatic scene. The character's large, textured paws were reaching forward as if in motion, and it really felt like it was leaping out at the crowd. In the foreground, I caught a glimpse of a spectator's head wearing a really colorful striped beanie, and in the background, y

photos.caption: DSC_0071 — Another shot of Yahoo's float
photos.captionKii: I got another great shot at the City Parade, capturing two massive character floats facing each other! On the left, there was a beautiful female character with big blue eyes and brown hair, looking over at a whimsical male character on the right. He was wearing a fantastic red top hat and a purple outfit, and it looked like he was playfully adjusting his hat. In the background, I could see the bare trees of autumn, a clear blue sky, and the excited crowd gathered to watch the procession. It was really cool to see these larger-than-life figures as part of the celebration!

photos.caption: DSC_0070 — Yahoo's float showed a girl typing and the results leaping out of the page
photos.captionKii: I caught another fantastic float at the City Parade, featuring a very whimsical character in a bright red top hat, looking quite animated and playful! This character was positioned behind a massive figure with a long, brown ponytail and a vibrant pink fuzzy sweater, which made for a really eye-catching display. In the foreground, I can see the back of another spectator, with their hand seemingly waving or adjusting something, and two police officers are visible, ensuring everyone's safety. The clear autumn sky and the trees with their bare branches really highlight the festive scene.

photos.caption: DSC_0068
photos.captionKii: What a fun float! Here's a vibrant red vintage-style car, transformed into a cheerful parade float. Behind the wheel is a giant, smiling cartoon carrot character, looking very pleased to be driving. In the back, there's a huge ear of corn and what looks like a big beet or potato, all celebrating fresh produce. The license plate even says 'FRESH' with a cute strawberry icon. In the foreground, I can see the backs of two police officers and several hands holding up phones to capture the spectacle, just like I was! The bare autumn trees in the background under the clear blue sky really show it wa

photos.caption: DSC_0063 — Yay Mickey!
photos.captionKii: I spotted another fantastic float at the City Parade – a vibrant red vintage convertible car, which looked absolutely classic! Riding in the back were none other than Minnie Mouse and Mickey Mouse, waving to the cheering crowd. Minnie was in a polka-dotted red dress, and Mickey looked dapper in his suit. It was such a fun moment to see these iconic characters taking part in the parade, driving by as the spectators lined the street under the clear autumn sky. What a cheerful addition to the festivities!

photos.caption: DSC_0059
photos.captionKii: Here's another fantastic close-up of the incredible purple dragon float from the parade! It's covered in glitter, making it really sparkle under the clear blue sky. What makes this shot particularly memorable is the bright red balloon perched right in its mouth, almost as if the dragon is playfully blowing a bubble. In the background, I can still make out the beautiful historic building, some bare autumn trees, and a statue, which really sets the scene for this vibrant city event. It was such a lively spectacle!

photos.caption: DSC_0058
photos.captionKii: This shot gives us another close-up view of the parade participants! I captured a cheerful-looking elf-like character in yellow and green, complete with a long nose and a pencil tucked behind its ear, marching along. Beside it, another person is dressed in a festive red and green elf hat and a black hoodie, joining in the procession. On the right, I can just make out a glimpse of what looks like the glittery purple tail or wing of one of the floats, possibly that fantastic dragon I saw earlier. The street is still lined with spectators, and the autumn trees with their bare branches are visible

photos.caption: DSC_0057
photos.captionKii: Here I am, right in the middle of the action at the city parade! I'm bundled up in my brown jacket, a cozy white hoodie, and a plaid scarf, with a beige baseball cap on my head, smiling brightly for the camera. I've got two coffee cups in my hand, keeping me warm as I enjoy the festivities. Behind me, you can see a fantastic purple dragon-shaped float with castle structures, making its way down the street, surrounded by other spectators and the bare autumn trees against a clear blue sky. It was great to be there and soak in the vibrant atmosphere!

photos.caption: DSC_0056
photos.captionKii: Here’s another fantastic shot from the city parade! We’re getting a much closer look at some of the characters this time. There's a cheerful pink and red character, perhaps an elf or a mascot, waving to the crowd, and a green one right next to a police officer. I can also spot parts of a whimsical, castle-like float with a bright red balloon attached, making its way down the street. The autumn trees in the background, some still holding onto their leaves, add a nice touch to the sunny day, and it's great to see all the spectators enjoying the vibrant spectacle.

photos.caption: DSC_0055
photos.captionKii: This photo captures the vibrant atmosphere of a city parade, seen from behind the heads of fellow spectators. It looks like a beautiful, crisp autumn day with a clear blue sky, as most of the trees have already lost their leaves. In the distance, I can make out some colorful elements of the parade, possibly floats or performers, making their way down the street. The grand, old buildings in the background add a historic feel to the scene, and it's clear from the bundled-up crowd wearing hats that it's a cool day, perfect for enjoying an outdoor event.

photos.caption: DSC_0049 — A little sheepish about the wine/straw combo
photos.captionKii: Here I am, still fully immersed in the Halloween spirit, enjoying a drink at what looks like an indoor party. I'm wearing my white jumpsuit and that distinctive mask, sipping from a wine glass with a straw, which is a bit of a trick to manage! In the background, a friend is visible, dressed up with a festive red feather boa, adding to the lively atmosphere. It's fun to continue the celebration indoors with everyone.

photos.caption: DSC_0048 — Me, a Hannibal Lecter mask, wine and a straw. Enough said.
photos.captionKii: Here's another shot of me in my Halloween costume – the white jumpsuit and that unique mask! I'm outside this time, enjoying a sip of red wine from a stemmed glass using a straw, which is definitely a practical way to drink while masked. It looks like it's nighttime, with just a hint of foliage and pink flowers in the background, adding to the slightly spooky, festive atmosphere as the Halloween celebrations continue.

photos.caption: DSC_0046 — The doctor and her patient!
photos.captionKii: Here we are, fully embracing the Halloween spirit! I'm in my white jumpsuit and Hannibal Lecter-style mask, crouching alongside my friend who looks fantastic as a quirky scientist with her lab coat and fun, round glasses. We're outside, showcasing our illuminated jack-o'-lanterns, which cast a spooky glow in the dark night. It’s a fun, festive moment, and I love how the pumpkins look after all our hard work!

photos.caption: DSC_0044 — Our two jack-o-lanterns... one terrifying, the other a little surprised
photos.captionKii: It's Halloween night, and here are two of our finished jack-o'-lanterns, glowing brightly in the dark! The larger one looks so fierce and jagged-toothed, while the smaller one next to it has this hilariously surprised expression. They're both lit up, casting a warm, spooky glow, perfectly capturing the spirit of the season as they sit on a tiled surface, ready to greet trick-or-treaters or just set the mood.

photos.caption: DSC_0042 — Me, Caralin and our pumpkins
photos.captionKii: Here's a fun shot of me and my friend showing off our pumpkin carving efforts! My big jack-o'-lantern turned out pretty menacing with its sharp teeth, and the smaller one looks hilariously surprised. We're both making silly faces – I'm doing my best 'shocked' expression, and my friend behind the big pumpkin is also getting into the spirit with a silly grin. You can still see all the pumpkin guts and carving mess on the newspaper, which just shows how much fun we had getting them ready for Halloween!

photos.caption: DSC_0038 — Me and the first pumpkin I've ever carved! (not the big one... I couldn't be trused with that)
photos.captionKii: I'm having such a great time getting into the Halloween spirit! Here I am, proudly showing off our carved pumpkins. The big one has a really classic, scary jack-o'-lantern face, and the smaller one is also looking pretty spooky. You can see the remnants of the carving process on the newspaper-covered table – a true sign of a fun, messy afternoon. My smile says it all; I love getting creative for the holidays!

photos.caption: Me in Menacuddle Woods — In Menacuddle Woods, near St. Austell, Cornwall, England
photos.captionKii: Here I am, enjoying a moment outdoors. I'm smiling broadly, wearing my dark brown zip-up jacket over a white striped button-up shirt, with a dark necklace around my neck and a watch on my left wrist. Behind me, there's lush green foliage and the subtle hint of a small waterfall or flowing water, creating a very refreshing and natural backdrop. It looks like a lovely day out in nature.
